name: Dungeon Bar: Gachi Puzzles
short_description: Dungeon Bar is a classic puzzle game in neonoir style. You will have to piece by piece collect pictures of legendary personalities of the Gachimuchi...
detailed_description:
Come on in and make yourself comfortable in our bar, stranger! You will have to literally recreate the history of this place by collecting photos of legendary personalities of the "Dungeon" Bar. You are waiting for 15 exciting puzzle levels in the style of classic jigsaw puzzles with a mesmerizing soundtrack.

C'mon, let's go!
